name: Discount Investment Corporation Ltd.
summary: Discount Investment Corporation Ltd., a holding company, invests in companies in various sectors in Israel and internationally. it provides information security and content, landline, data communication, internet connectivity, and international telephony services; conference call, cloud computing and security, cloud transmission, integration and hosting, and IoT solutions for business customers and telecommunication operators; and television over Internet services, including television channel broadcasts, including channels which are provided through Idan+ broadcasts and video on demand, as well as end-user equipment and end-user equipment repair services. As of December 31, 2019, the company serves approximately 258 thousand television subscribers and 278 thousand internet infrastructure subscribers; and 2.74 million mobile subscribers. It is also involved in the initiating, planning, constructing, and managing hi-tech parks, industrial parks, commercial properties, office buildings, and shopping and logistics centers, as well as residential neighborhoods; and ownership of the supermarket chain under the Shufersal name, as well as provision of credit cards, which include membership in Shufersal's customer club. In addition, the company grows and exports citrus, and other fruits and vegetables; manages investment portfolios and mutual funds; and offers investment banking services. The company was founded in 1961 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel. Discount Investment Corporation Limited is a subsidiary of Dolphin IL Investments Ltd.
